# `mod.ron` — field reference

<!-- GENERATED by `cargo run -p dc_data_docs` (dronecom #2815). Do not edit: field docs live as /// comments on the Rust structs. -->

Data: [`modding/`](../../modding/)

## `ModManifest`

A mod's required manifest: `{dir}/mod.ron`.

All fields are player-authored and explicit — no serde defaults (project
rule): a typo'd or missing field must fail loudly as a Mods-screen
diagnostic, never silently substitute a default.

### `name` : `String`

Display name. Seeds the Workshop item title on first publish.

### `author` : `String`

The mod author's name, shown on the Mods screen and Workshop page.

### `description` : `String`

Short description. Seeds the Workshop item description on first publish.
